title: Unlucky Circumstance reduces equipped creature AL to one

card.rawText: Reduce target creature's AL to 1 for 1 turn cycle.

plan.title: Unlucky Circumstance reduces equipped creature AL to one
plan.summary: Play Unlucky Circumstance on a creature and verify its effective AL is temporarily set to 1.

notes: Equip Unlucky Circumstance to player_1 primary creature.
Use an AL6 primary so the AL=1 set is visible.

steps: Player 1 plays Unlucky Circumstance and equips it to their primary creature.
Read the equipped creature's effective AL.
manualVerification: Confirm the AL set expires after one full turn cycle.
riskNotes: This fixture validates the set layer while equipped; expiry timing should be covered separately.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
